segment.source: A spotlight block that presents one flagship case study in full, pairing a large hero image with the client name, detailed description, and a row of up to four key metrics. Use it as a centerpiece on a homepage or proof page to showcase your most compelling result. Fields include eyebrow, headline, client name and logo, rich-text description, hero image, a metrics collection of value and label pairs, and a link to the full case study.
